violations.detail: The containerDelegate(), textDelegate(), attach(), and detach() overrides at lines 149-179 are between the 'instance' and 'builder' sections, outside any named section. Consider placing them in the 'builder' or 'api' section.
ARIA method at line 236 is named aria(TriggerAria) instead of following the aria<Attribute>() naming convention. This is an intentional design choice for a specialized TriggerAria enum parameter.
